query: How many days of annual leave do employees get and what is the process to apply for leave?

retrieved_chunks.text: Employees are entitled to 25 days of paid annual leave per calendar year. This entitlement increases progressively based on years of service: 0–2 years of service: 25 days per year. Leave accrues at a rate of 2.08 days per month for full-time employees.

The company offers competitive benefits including health insurance, dental coverage, and pension contributions matched up to 6% of salary. Employees are encouraged to review their benefits package annually during the open enrollment period.

Performance reviews are conducted annually in December. Employees should prepare self-assessments using the Performance Review Template available on the HR Portal. Ratings are: Exceptional, Exceeds Expectations, Meets Expectations, and Needs Improvement.
